title: PTPS130 130W Detail Palm Sander
description: From the manufacturer Hilka PTPS130 130w Detail Palm Sander Product Description Compact, lightweight 130w detail palm sander suitable for multipurpose sanding use. Ergonomic soft grip handle. Dust extraction facility. Copper coiled motor for lasting performance. Easy to change hook and loop base. Specifications: Voltage: 230-240V - 50Hz Input power: 130W No-load speed: 0-15,000rpm Pad size: 140 x 95mm Cable length: 2m About this item Copper coiled motor Dust extraction facility Soft grip handle Compact / lightweight 10 sanding sheets 1 dust connector We take pride in being a leading name in the UK's tool and hardware industry, dedicated to offering innovative and cost-effective solutions for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike.
